hero.description: Perfection is achieved not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing more to take away.

items.title: Liceo de Frailes CMS
items.description: A content management platform built for a local school to publish and organize multimedia content. Designed for non-technical staff with a focus on usability.

items.title: Code Sensor
items.description: Connects to GitHub, analyzes repositories, and provides intelligent feedback using AI. Built to help developers understand and improve their codebase.

items.title: Inter Lab
items.description: An AI-powered interview platform with voice interaction. Simulates real technical interviews and provides detailed feedback to help candidates prepare.

about.label: About
about.title: Focused on what matters
paragraphs: I don't believe in code for the sake of code. Every project I take on starts with understanding the problem, not choosing the framework.

I work with React, TypeScript, and Next.js on projects that need to scale. But more importantly, I care about the people using what I build — whether that's a content editor at a school or a developer trying to improve their code.
When I'm not building, I'm learning. The best solutions come from understanding the fundamentals, not following trends.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Have a project in mind or just want to talk about tech? I'm always open to interesting conversations.
